title: Hyundai India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Hyundai India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Quality Control Engineer with drive and ambition, Hyundai India in Pune is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Hyundai India:
Hyundai India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hyundai India!
